properties.text:
Swarnendu Bhandari's résumé outlines his education, projects, awards, and technical skills.
- 2020: Swarnendu Bhandari completed the Class X board exam at Panchthupi T.N. Institution with 84.7%.
- 2022: Swarnendu Bhandari completed the Class XII board exam at Krishnath College School with 93.8%.
- Nov 2022 – present: Swarnendu Bhandari is pursuing an integrated B.Tech + M.Tech at IIT Kharagpur with a CGPA of 8.26/10.
- Feb 2025 – Sep 2025: Swarnendu Bhandari developed Dmaid.cloud, an AI‑powered Mermaid diagram editor that uses Llama 4 and DeepSeek R1 LLMs, supports over 20 diagram types, and provides Google Sign‑In via Firebase.
- Dec 2025 – present: Swarnendu Bhandari leads the InfuseAI project as platform architect and team leader, designing a Retrieval‑Augmented Generation pipeline, cloud‑native architecture, and developer SDK with Pinecone.
- Jan 2026: Swarnendu Bhandari won the Best Deep Tech Idea award at the Entrepreneurship Launchpad Programme (RMSoEE, IIT Kharagpur) for the InfuseAI concept.
- Jan 2026: Swarnendu Bhandari secured the Vercel Track winner position at AI Agents Assemble 2025 (WeMakeDevs) and received $2,000 funding for InfuseAI.
- Swarnendu Bhandari is proficient in frameworks and libraries such as Next.js, React.js, Prisma, Numpy, Pandas, Express.js, OpenAPI Spec, Mongoose, and Socket.io.
- Swarnendu Bhandari knows programming languages including Typescript, Python, C, Rust, Java, Javascript, and Solidity.
- Swarnendu Bhandari uses tools and platforms like Git, GitHub, Docker, Bash, Postman, Linux, Firebase, Google Gemini APIs, Cloudflare, and MongoDB Atlas.
- Swarnendu Bhandari can be contacted at +91 8101199607 or clickswarnendu123@gmail.com and is based in Kharagpur, West Bengal, India.

# Knowledge Base Document: Swarnendu_Resume.pdf
Knowledge Base ID: 53032dc48ed8417098b3

SWARNENDU BHANDARI
+91 8101199607 	clickswarnendu123@gmail.com 	swarnendu_ 	GitHub 	Kharagpur, WB, IN
EDUCATIONS
Year 	Degree 	Institute 	CGPA/MARKS
Nov 2022 - Present 	B. Tech + M. Tech (Integrated) 	IIT Kharagpur 	8.26 / 10
2022 - 2022 	CLASS XII BOARD EXAM 	Krishnath College School 	93.8%
2020 - 2020 	CLASS X BOARD EXAM 	Panchthupi T.N. Institution 	84.7%
PROJECTS
|	InfuseAI | AI Platform for Creating AI Apps under 10 minutes 	Website Github
Group Project | Role: Platform Architect & Team Leader
Dec 2025 - Present
Led ideation and framing for a production-ready AI platform enabling rapid deployment of knowledge-grounded applications.
Designed and architected a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipeline, optimized for accuracy, latency, and workloads.
Implemented cloud-native RAG architecture, encompassing data ingestion, vector indexing, retrieval, and LLM orchestration.
Developed a developer SDK for seamless integration of AI assistants into external applications with minimal setup.
Defined system architecture and API contracts, ensuring modularity, extensibility, and multi-tenant support.
Authored comprehensive technical documentation on architecture, SDK usage, deployment workflows, and best practices.
Technologies / Tools Used : RAG, LLMs, SDK Development, Pinecone
|	Orbit AI Workspace 	Github Vercel
Engineered a scalable travel platform using Next.js 16 (App Router) and TypeScript; implemented a complex
MongoDB/Mongoose backend for managing holiday packages and user customizations.
Developed a premium landing page and dashboard with micro-animations and parallax effects using Framer Motion and Tailwind
CSS, focusing on glassmorphism and responsive design.
Implemented a robust security layer with AuthGuard components, ensuring secure data persistence and protected access to user
dashboards via Firebase.
Built an interactive Package Customizer component using Zustand for state management, enabling users to select inclusions,
adjust trip durations, and receive real-time pricing updates.
Optimized application performance with debounced data fetching and isolated CSS architecture; integrated collaborative features
using the Tambo AI SDK and Tiptap for dynamic content editing.
Technologies / Tools Used : MongoDB, Tambo, Next.js, System Designing
|	Dmaid.cloud | AI Powered Mermaid Diagram Editor 	Website Github 	Feb 2025 - Sep 2025
Developed an AI-powered, canvas-based Mermaid diagram editor supporting interactive creation of 20+ types of diagrams.
Integrated Llama 4 and DeepSeek R1 LLMs for AI-driven Mermaid diagram generation using context-aware prompting.
Enabled direct embedding of Mermaid diagrams into 3 formats (SVG, HTML and Markdown) through the frontend interface.
Programmed undo/redo functionality using stack data structures, supporting up to 300 states through state management.
Integrated Google Sign-In authentication using Firebase, enabling secure user onboarding and access control for 50+ users.
Chosen from over 200+ project ideas to present at GradCapital; earned strong feedback and investment interest from the VC.
Technologies / Tools Used : Mermaid, LLMs, Codemirror
AWARDS & ACHIEVEMENTS
`Best Deep Tech Idea` Award | Entrepreneurship Launchpad Programme | RMSoEE, IIT Kharagpur 	Jan 2026
Presented the deep-tech startup concept Infuse AI to investors, industry experts, and RMSOEE faculty during final pitch sessions.
Awarded 'Best Deep Tech Idea' by the Head of School and Vivek Wadhwa (CEO, Vionix Biosciences) for technical depth.
Led a four-member team, driving ideation, development, pitch strategy, and investor communication throughout the programme.
Vercel Track Winner | AI Agents Assemble 2025 | WeMakeDevs Community 	Jan 2026
Secured Position for 'Vercel Track' at AI Agents Assemble 2025, developing InfuseAI among 324 projects.
Created a scalable RAG pipeline with a management dashboard and developer SDK; received $2,000 funding.
SKILLS
Frameworks Libraries : 	Next.js, React.js, Prisma, Numpy, Pandas, Express.js, OpenAPI Spec, Mongoose, Socket.io
Programming Languages : 	Typescript, Python, C, Rust, Java, Javascript, Solidity
Tools Platforms : 	Git, GitHub, Docker, Bash, Postman, Linux, Firebase, Google Gemini APIs, Cloudflare, MongoDB
Atlas, LLM APIs

properties.text:
Swarnendu Bhandari's resume outlines his education, work experience, projects, awards, and technical skills.
- In April 2019 to April 2020, Swarnendu completed the Class X board exam at Panchthupi T.N. Institution with 84.7% marks.
- In July 2020 to July 2022, Swarnendu completed the Class XII board exam at Krishnath College School with 93.8% marks.
- From November 2022 to May 2027, Swarnendu is pursuing an integrated B.Tech + M.Tech at IIT Kharagpur, holding a CGPA of 8.33/10.
- From February 2025 to September 2025, Swarnendu developed Dmaid.cloud, an AI‑powered Mermaid diagram editor that integrates Llama 4 and DeepSeek R1, supports 20+ diagram types, and uses Firebase Google Sign‑In for user authentication.
- From December 2025 to the present, Swarnendu leads the InfuseAI project as Platform Architect and Team Leader, designing a cloud‑native Retrieval‑Augmented Generation platform, a developer SDK, and multi‑tenant architecture.
- In January 2026, Swarnendu’s InfuseAI received the Best Deep Tech Idea award at the Entrepreneurship Launchpad Programme of RMSoEE, IIT Kharagpur.
- In January 2026, Swarnendu’s InfuseAI won the Vercel Track at AI Agents Assemble 2025, earning a $2,000 prize.
- From May 2027 to July 2027, Swarnendu interned as a Data Scientist at Fidelity Investments AI Center of Excellence in Bangalore, where he built Neo4j knowledge‑graph pipelines, GPT‑5.2 extraction workflows, a RAGAS‑based evaluation framework, and a production Streamlit application.
- Swarnendu is proficient with frameworks and libraries such as Next.js, React.js, Prisma, NumPy, pandas, Express.js, OpenAPI Spec, Mongoose, and Socket.io.
- Swarnendu is skilled in programming languages including TypeScript, Python, C, Rust, Java, JavaScript, and Solidity.
- Swarnendu utilizes tools and platforms like Git, Docker, Bash, Postman, Linux, Firebase, Google Gemini APIs, Cloudflare, MongoDB Atlas, and various LLM APIs.
